svg.title: PixelNarrator — Image Captioning with Attention
svg.desc: GitHub banner for PixelNarrator, an end-to-end image captioning system using CNN encoder, Bahdanau attention, and LSTM decoder on MS COCO 2017.
svg.text: CNN encoder · Bahdanau attention · LSTM decoder · MS COCO 2017
a large airplane is sitting on a runway.
